# Copilot Instructions

- Treat this workspace as a premium Next.js App Router project for DSTRTO CITY.
- Keep the visual language dark, neon, immersive, and GTA-inspired.
- Preserve the existing folder structure and reusable component approach.
- Keep background music opt-in, persistent, and low-volume by default.
- Prefer small, targeted edits over broad refactors.
- Use the current branding palette based on cyan, aqua, deep navy, and black.
